decisions.value: Global cfs stays a thin launcher. Normal commands resolve the repo-local .bootstrap engine first using root AGENTS.md and cf-studio-path, then fall back to ~/.cf-studio/cache only when no valid project engine exists.
init and update intentionally operate on the global cache and must not execute repo-local .bootstrap.
Commands are classified as proxy-local, cache management, delegated normal commands, or diagnostics.
The stable proxy diagnostics command is cfs proxy doctor. Supported forms are --verbose, --json, and --json --verbose.
Do not add a permanent top-level cfs --proxy-diagnostics flag. If it already shipped, support it only as a time-boxed deprecated alias.
Bare cfs doctor remains delegated to the selected engine.
cfs proxy doctor --json emits schema_version cfs.proxy_doctor.v1 with status, summary, proxy, and checks.

V1 checks are proxy_executable, workspace_root, root_agents_marker, cf_studio_path, project_skill, cache_skill, skill_provenance, engine_selection, trust_state, redaction_policy, and project_code_execution_blocked.
Each check has id, status, summary, evidence, remediation, and details. Details is always an object. Remediation is null only on pass.
Worst severity wins: fail beats warn, warn beats pass.
Exit 0 for pass or warn, 1 for CLI parse or usage error only, and 2 for diagnostic fail or report/schema contract failure.
Default human output prints status, selected engine, then actionable warnings/failures. Verbose output expands with resolution trace and fixed-order checks.
JSON output is one pretty-printed object to stdout. JSON verbose uses the same schema and only enriches details.diagnostics and resolution_trace.
Diagnostics must be no-exec and redacted. Redaction leaks, malformed JSON, report construction failures, or inability to prove no-exec due to internal diagnostic error are fail conditions.

open_questions: Freeze golden examples for pass, warn, fail, verbose warn, JSON warn, and JSON verbose fail.
Define exact per-check details fields for all eleven v1 checks.
Decide the migration window only if a top-level proxy diagnostics alias already exists in released material.
